title: Aurinia moreana
taxonomy: Aurinia moreana is classified in the family Brassicaceae and is a species of flowering plant. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and its taxonomic relationships with other plants. Aurinia moreana is a member of the genus Aurinia, which is a group of plants commonly known as wallflowers. The family Brassicaceae includes a wide range of flowering plants, including cabbages, mustards, and wallflowers. Aurinia moreana's classification reflects its evolutionary history and its position within the plant kingdom.
